postReview.title: Reus says LA Galaxy's title defence off to worst possible start
postReview.description: The LA Galaxy lost 3-0 to St. Louis City in front of their home fans on Sunday, extending their miserable start to the 2025 MLS season.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy v St. Louis City: Winless hosts improving in front of goal, says Vanney
preReview.description: The LA Galaxy and St. Louis City meet at Dignity Health Sports Park this weekend, with both looking to get their first win of the season.

QAData.question: Who won between LA Galaxy and St. Louis City on Sun, 09 Mar 2025 23:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: St. Louis City won 3–0 over LA Galaxy on Sun, 09 Mar 2025 23:00:00 GMT.
